meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop abandoning SaaS builds. Learn to master Claude Code skills setup with Antigravity to accelerate your MVP development and hit revenue targets faster.
content.answer_block: To finish projects, leverage Claude Code to automate boilerplate and architectural debt. By integrating Antigravity as a workflow orchestrator, you transition from 'stuck' to 'shipping' by offloading cognitive load to autonomous agents that execute high-fidelity code, ensuring your MVP remains lean, maintainable, and ready for market launch.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with 'almost-finished' MVPs. You start with high-octane energy, but as the complexity of the tech stack mounts and the architectural decisions multiply, the momentum dies. You aren't failing because you lack ideas; you are failing because the friction of implementation exceeds your velocity of execution.

This isn't just about writing code; it's about re-engineering your development lifecycle. By mastering Claude Code in tandem with Antigravity, you transform from a frustrated founder into a high-leverage architect. We are shifting the focus from manual keystrokes to intent-driven development, allowing you to cross the finish line while your competitors are still debugging their environment configurations.

steps.title: Environment Scoping with Antigravity
steps.description: Define your project boundaries to prevent scope creep, which is the primary killer of founder-led builds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project directory and generate a lean architectural roadmap focused on MVP core features only. Identify technical debt and prioritize tasks by revenue impact.

steps.title: Configuring Claude Code Context
steps.description: Provide Claude with your business logic and constraints to ensure the output aligns with your monetization strategy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claudecoderules file that enforces clean, modular code architecture and prioritizes rapid deployment over premature optimization.

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Eliminate the 'blank page' syndrome by having the agent scaffold your core database and authentication logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready boilerplate for user auth and Stripe integration using the established project architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement authentication and stripe checkout flow based on the architectural roadmap'

steps.title: Iterative Feature Injection
steps.description: Use Claude Code to build features in isolated, testable chunks to maintain momentum.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current feature implementation to be more modular and add unit tests for the critical path.

steps.title: Continuous Validation and Deploy
steps.description: Automate the final check before pushing to production to ensure no breaking changes were introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current state of the codebase against the initial scope. Identify any blockers or loose ends preventing a production launch.

pro_tips: Treat your .claudecoderules file as a living document; update it whenever you find Claude making a repeating architectural error.
Use Antigravity to generate 'negative constraints'—explicitly tell the AI what NOT to build to keep your codebase lean.
Prioritize building the payment flow before the UI; if you can't charge, you don't have a business, you have a hobby.
Run Claude Code in 'agent' mode for complex refactors, but keep a close eye on the diffs to maintain your own mental model of the system.
Always commit after every successful Claude Code task; granular git history is your safety net when experimenting with AI-generated code.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, schedule your first 'Ship Day'. Use Claude Code to build one revenue-generating feature per week and push to production every Friday.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical leverage to move faster than ever. Don't let your project sit in the 'almost done' folder for another month. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
